title: Petri Net
description: A Petri net model, inspired by PNML but expressed as JSON. Supports P/T nets, inhibitor nets, and is designed to extend to stochastic nets (SLPN, GSPN) without breaking changes.

id.description: Unique identifier for this net instance.

description.description: Optional free-text description or provenance note.

netType.description: Declares the net dialect. Analogous to the PNML type URI. Consumers may use this to decide which fields are meaningful (e.g. transition.weight is relevant for slpn/gspn, transition.delay for timed nets).

position.description: 2D canvas coordinates. Present when layout information is available; may be omitted in semantics-only interchange (e.g. from a web service that does not compute layout).

place.description: A place in the Petri net. Corresponds to PNML <place>.

id.description: Unique identifier for this place. Referenced by arc.source and arc.target.

tokens.description: Initial marking: number of tokens in this place at the start. Corresponds to PNML <initialMarking>.

capacity.description: Maximum tokens this place can hold. Null means unbounded. Corresponds to PNML <capacity> in capacity-net extensions.

finalMarking.description: Expected token count at termination, used for conformance checking. Null means no constraint. Corresponds to PNML <finalMarkings>.

transition.description: A transition in the Petri net. Corresponds to PNML <transition>.

id.description: Unique identifier for this transition. Referenced by arc.source and arc.target.

label.description: Activity label. Empty string or absent on a silent transition. Corresponds to PNML <name>.

silent.description: True for invisible (tau) transitions that do not correspond to an observable activity. When true, label is ignored for conformance purposes.

priority.description: Conflict resolution rank. Higher value fires first when multiple transitions compete for the same tokens. In GSPN semantics, immediate transitions (priority > 0) pre-empt timed transitions (priority = 0).

delay.description: Deterministic firing delay in abstract time units. For stochastic/timed nets, prefer the 'firingDistribution' extension over this field.

weight.description: Stochastic firing weight. Used in SLPN and GSPN semantics: the probability of this transition firing (among all enabled transitions) is proportional to its weight. Ignored for plain P/T nets. Distinct from arc.weight, which is a token multiplicity.

arc.description: A directed arc connecting a place to a transition, or a transition to a place. Corresponds to PNML <arc>.

source.description: ID of the source node (place or transition). Must refer to an existing place or transition.

target.description: ID of the target node (place or transition). Must be the opposite kind from source (place→transition or transition→place).

weight.description: Token multiplicity: tokens consumed from (or produced into) the connected place when the transition fires. Corresponds to PNML <inscription>. Not meaningful for inhibitor or read arcs.

type.description: Arc semantics. 'regular': standard consume/produce. 'inhibitor': transition is blocked when source place has tokens >= arc.weight. 'read': tests for tokens without consuming (also called a test arc). 'reset': empties the source place on firing. 'modifier': reserved for future use.

label.description: Optional display annotation, typically the arc weight as a string when weight > 1.

points.description: Ordered list of waypoints for curved or routed arc rendering. Empty means draw a straight line. Omitted in semantics-only interchange.
